universe.description: 75-name universe: top U.S. mega/large-cap stocks by market cap with full GICS sector coverage (3-5+ names per sector).

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P -0.11%, Nasdaq +0.35%, Dow -0.56%. Materials led sectors (+0.81%) while Healthcare lagged (-1.34%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +1.02%. DeepSeek Reasoner API failed. 4 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +8.65%.
